# thoth Provider

Thoth provider for headless AI Governance Control Plane operations.

Use the `thoth` provider to configure tenant-level governance settings, browser and MDM integrations, and scoped API keys.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    thoth = {
      source  = "atensecurity/thoth"
      version = ">= 0.1.8"
    }
  }
}

provider "thoth" {
  tenant_id   = "acme"
  apex_domain = "atensecurity.com" # optional
  org_api_key = var.org_api_key
}
```

## Authentication

The provider supports two authentication modes:

1. Organization API key (recommended for automation)
2. Admin bearer token (legacy/operator workflows)

### Recommended: Organization API Key

Use one of:

- `org_api_key`
- `org_api_key_file`
- `THOTH_API_KEY` environment variable

`THOTH_API_KEY` must contain an organization-scoped key.

### Tenant Resolution

Use one of:

- `tenant_id`
- `THOTH_TENANT_ID` environment variable

### Alternative: Admin Bearer Token

Use one of:

- `admin_bearer_token`
- `admin_bearer_token_file`

### Auth Resolution Rules

- `org_api_key*` and `admin_bearer_token*` are mutually exclusive. Configuring both fails provider initialization.
- If both inline and file inputs are set for the same auth mode, inline value is used.
- `THOTH_API_KEY` is only used when no explicit auth attributes are set.
- Provider initialization fails if no usable credentials are supplied.

### Environment Variable Example

```bash
export THOTH_API_KEY="thoth_org_..."
export THOTH_TENANT_ID="acme"
```

```terraform
provider "thoth" {}
```

### File-Based API Key Example

```terraform
provider "thoth" {
  org_api_key_file = pathexpand("~/.thoth/org_api_key")
}
```

### Admin Token Example

```terraform
provider "thoth" {
  admin_bearer_token_file = pathexpand("~/.thoth/admin_bearer_token")
}
```

## Endpoint Derivation

When `api_base_url` is not set, the provider derives it as:

`https://grid.<tenant_id>.<apex_domain>`

By default, `apex_domain` is `atensecurity.com`.


<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `tenant_id` (String) Tenant slug used in GovAPI route scoping. If omitted, provider reads THOTH_TENANT_ID.
- `admin_bearer_token` (String, Sensitive) Admin bearer token used for authenticated GovAPI requests.
- `admin_bearer_token_file` (String) Path to a file containing the admin bearer token.
- `org_api_key` (String, Sensitive) Organization-scoped API key used for non-interactive CI/CD control-plane operations.
- `org_api_key_file` (String) Path to a file containing the organization-scoped API key.
- `apex_domain` (String) Apex domain used to derive GovAPI host when api_base_url is omitted. Defaults to atensecurity.com.
- `api_base_url` (String) GovAPI base URL override. When omitted, provider derives https://grid.<tenant_id>.<apex_domain>.
- `insecure_skip_tls_verify` (Boolean) Skip TLS certificate verification (development/testing only).
- `request_timeout_seconds` (Number) Per-request timeout in seconds.
- `retry_base_delay_ms` (Number) Base delay in milliseconds for exponential retry backoff.
- `retry_max_attempts` (Number) Maximum retry attempts for transient API/network failures.
- `retry_max_delay_ms` (Number) Maximum delay in milliseconds for retry backoff.
